summary: D'CLIC PRO Questionnaire Integration - All 26 questions verified, backend APIs working, frontend questionnaire and results page functional with 9 sections including Carte d'Identité Pro with 4 quadrants on dark background.

Profile computation returns all required sub-profiles: vertus_profile, riasec_profile, compass, integrated_analysis, ofman_quadrant, life_path, cross_analysis
Carte d'Identité Pro section displays 4 quadrants (Identité Personnelle, Professionnelle, Sociale, Profonde) on dark #1a1a2e background
Results page has 9 navigation sections as required
Access code format XXXX-XXXX correctly generated
seed_data_creation: Test user CarteTester created, D'CLIC results stored in dclic_results collection

Dashboard has D'CLIC import modal with code input field.
